construction.panels: standard set-in sleeves with a main body panel, ribbed cuffs and hem, and an attached hood.
construction.seams: standard stitching, tone-on-tone, not visibly contrasting.
construction.closures: full-front snap button closure with black plastic snaps. The hood features a black drawstring.
construction.details: ribbed knit cuffs and hem in black. The jacket has an attached hood made of a matte black fabric, likely fleece or cotton. Side pockets are implied by the bomber jacket style, though not explicitly visible in detail.

graphics.content: Stylized rose graphic with leaves and abstract elements, featuring a central rose with petals and a stem emerging from a base of leaves/roots.
graphics.style: embroidered, slightly raised, with detailed stitching for shading and texture.

branding.primary_logo: The embroidered stylized rose graphic, representing the 'BLACK Rose' theme.
branding.secondary_marks: A small, blurry tag is visible inside the neck, likely a brand or size tag, but details are not discernible.

fabric_appearance: The main body and sleeves exhibit a smooth, lustrous satin finish. The hood, cuffs, and hem are made of a ribbed knit fabric with a matte appearance, likely cotton or fleece. (Note: While the product context mentions 'Sherpa Jacket', the exterior visible in the image is satin; Sherpa would likely be an interior lining not shown.)
unique_features: The combination of a luxurious satin exterior with a casual hooded bomber silhouette. The intricate embroidered rose graphic provides a distinctive focal point.
collection_aesthetic: dark luxury, Oakland grit, emotional expression
